checks.label: API-Football key
checks.action: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries and API-Football odds can be read back.

checks.label: Production fixture targets
checks.action: Run bun run scout:data-targets or set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS to fixtures that return lineups, injuries and odds.

checks.label: Odds provider
checks.action: Configure API-Football odds or set VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY.

checks.label: Static hosting data proxy
checks.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL to an HTTPS /proxy endpoint.

checks.label: API-Football enrichment limit
checks.action: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT to a positive value no larger than 50 to protect quota.

checks.label: Data scout search window
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_LIMIT and KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_TARGETS, or provide KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS with enough candidate fixtures.
